title: Marketing Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate marketing policies and programs, such as determining the demand for products and services offered by a firm and its competitors, and identify potential customers. Develop pricing strategies with the goal of maximizing the firm's profits or share of the market while ensuring the firm's customers are satisfied. Oversee product development or monitor trends that indicate the need for new products and services.

tasks.text: Identify, develop, or evaluate marketing strategy, based on knowledge of establishment objectives, market characteristics, and cost and markup factors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Formulate, direct, or coordinate marketing activities or policies to promote products or services, working with advertising or promotion managers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate the financial aspects of product development, such as budgets, expenditures, research and development appropriations, or return-on-investment and profit-loss projections.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop pricing strategies, balancing firm objectives and customer satisfaction.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile lists describing product or service offerings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct the hiring, training, or performance evaluations of marketing or sales staff and oversee their daily activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with product development personnel on product specifications, such as design, color, or packaging.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Use sales forecasting or strategic planning to ensure the sale and profitability of products, lines, or services, analyzing business developments and monitoring market trends.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate contracts with vendors or distributors to manage product distribution, establishing distribution networks or developing distribution strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate or participate in promotional activities or trade shows, working with developers, advertisers, or production managers, to market products or services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Initiate market research studies, or analyze their findings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with legal staff to resolve problems, such as copyright infringement or royalty sharing with outside producers or distributors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with buying personnel to gain advice regarding the types of products or services expected to be in demand.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with buying personnel to gain advice regarding environmentally sound or sustainable products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct economic or commercial surveys to identify potential markets for products or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend modifications to products, packaging, production processes, or other characteristics to improve the environmental soundness or sustainability of products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise business or other groups on local, national, or international factors affecting the buying or selling of products or services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select products or accessories to be displayed at trade or special production shows.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop business cases for environmental marketing strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Integrate environmental information into product or company marketing strategies, policies, or activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
